summary: Content Studio Multi-Content Campaign Engine testing complete. All 12 features verified: 4 tabs (Products/Services/Deals/Brand), 12 brand templates with 5 intent-based colors, Authority and Trust layout renderers, 6 layout options, 1:1 square image containers, Group Deal progress bars, dynamic caption generation (brand=no price, product=with price), Download button working, lazy loading enabled.

issues: Console warnings about duplicate React keys - non-critical but should be fixed for cleaner logs

critical_code_review_comments: React key warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key' - likely from mapping items without unique keys in some component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content Studio Multi-Content Campaign Engine fully tested. Key features verified: 1) 4 tabs: Products (29), Services (0), Deals (6), Brand (12). 2) Brand tab shows 12 templates with colored backgrounds by intent: authority=navy (#20364D), trust=green (emerald-700), urgency=red (red-700), soft_sell=gray (slate-100), value=amber (amber-50). 3) Clicking brand template opens Creative Drawer with Authority or Trust layout auto-selected based on intent. 4) Authority layout: centered statement, accent line, logo block, brand name. 5) Trust layout: checklist-style with check icons. 6) 6 layout options available. 7) Brand content captions have NO price. 8) Product/service captions have price and savings. 9) Download button works. 10) All images have loading='lazy' attribute. 11) Group Deal cards show progress bars and 'Group Deal' badges.

layout_renderers.authority_layout: PASS - Centered statement, accent line, logo block, brand name displayed
layout_renderers.trust_layout: PASS - Checklist-style with check icons for trust points
layout_renderers.auto_selection: PASS - Authority/Trust layouts auto-selected based on brand template intent

creative_drawer.captions_section: PASS - Short Caption, Social Post, WhatsApp/Sales, Story Text

lazy_loading.images: PASS - 17 images with loading='lazy' attribute found
